theme_archetype.description: Clean, authoritative, and precise to reflect QA engineering, strictly adhering to the Blue, Black, and White palette.

themes.name: Modern Minimal
themes.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with pure white background, generous padding, and 1px very light border. No shadows. Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm).

themes.name: Bold & Dark
themes.surface_strategy: Retro-Futurism/Terminal look. Pure black base, glowing blue accents, visible grid borders (border-collapse style). High contrast.

themes.name: Professional Corporate
themes.surface_strategy: Neumorphic tactile variant or Glassmorphism. Soft shadows (shadow-sm), subtle border radii (rounded-lg), high-end classic feel.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing: p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers must have internal padding.
layout_spacing.hero_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. Asymmetry, col-span-8 for main intro, col-span-4 for quick stats/CTA.
layout_spacing.skills_grid: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM. Dense, col-span-1 summary blocks, strict gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).

theme_switcher.strategy: Interactive header element. Uses context or standard React state to swap a `data-theme` attribute on the root html element, applying CSS variables.
theme_switcher.visuals: Icon-based toggle (Sun/Moon/Briefcase) or a segmented control switch using Shadcn Tabs.

hero.strategy: High impact introduction. Name in massive display typography. Blue-tinted abstract overlay.
hero.cta: Primary 'Download CV (PDF)' in solid brand blue. Secondary 'Contact' outlined.

timeline_experience.strategy: Vertical line on left side (border-l-2 border-border/40). Items connected with absolute positioned dots. Grouped responsibilities.
timeline_experience.typography: Role title prominent, company name subdued. Date in monospace.

stats_metrics.strategy: Massive typography (text-5xl+) for numbers '545+', '250+', '70+'. Monospace. Small overline labels.

contact_form.strategy: Shadcn Form elements. Custom styling based on active theme (e.g., solid inputs for minimal, glowing focus rings for dark, subtle inset shadows for corporate).

motion_interactions.hover_states: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 ease-out
motion_interactions.entrance: Framer Motion staggered children. `initial={{opacity: 0, y: 20}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}} transition={{staggerChildren: 0.1}}`
motion_interactions.buttons: Active state scales down (active:scale-95). Glow effect on dark mode.

hero_backgrounds.description: Wavy blue and white abstract architecture. Use with bg-white/60 backdrop-blur overlay.
Blue and black digital technology texture. Use with bg-black/50 overlay.
Clean and modern workspace. Use with bg-slate-50/80 backdrop-blur-md overlay.

avatar.description: Professional sitting at tech desk. Use as a masked silhouette or professional headshot stand-in.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React portfolio using Tailwind CSS.
Implement the 3 distinct themes (Minimal, Dark, Corporate) via a robust Theme Switcher. Use CSS variables to dynamically change colors across the page when switching themes.
Strictly follow the color palette constraint (Blue, Black, White). Variations should only be shades of these.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for tech stack & UI adornments.
Implement Shadcn UI for the Contact Form, Buttons, and Theme dropdown.
Load standard Google Fonts for the requested typography (IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono, Playfair Display, Cabinet Grotesk/Outfit).
Add 'data-testid' attributes exactly as described for all interactive and key elements.
Create dynamic hero backgrounds that swap based on the active theme, applying appropriate overlays so text contrast is never compromised.
